name: Adrian "Vigilante" Chase
description:
Adrian Chase angst.. 😮‍💨

I watched an angst edit of him the other day and read too many Tumblr posts about him and now I'm here ✌️😞

Based on his 30 seconds of screen time in "Need I Say Door" so, spoilers? I guess? I always suggest watching it first so

Adrian x Crime fighter! User, part of the 11th street kids

Not much said about User other than they live in an apartment building and they work with the 11th street kids. Open message is pretty open for your interpretation on how to start😄

If you notice something wrong with the opening message or with his character, let me know, just be nice about it 🫶
creator: Button_organizer
